title: Pre-release access list: annual legionellosis in residents of England and Wales release
body: "To ensure that appropriate individuals are able to respond to questions arising from information in our official statistics releases, we give them access to documents 24 hours before publication on GOV.UK. In doing this we follow the rules and principles set out in the Pre-release Access to Official Statistics Order 2008.  For more information, see our policy on pre-release access.  The lists on this page show the individuals who have been given pre-release access to UKHSA Legionellosis in residents of England and Wales: 2017 to 2023 release and Legionellosis in residents of England and Wales: 2024 release.  As the lists are not updated at regular intervals but only when a change has been made, each list will likely cover a different period from the one before.  "
